content.en:
The truncated finger is the physical body that accommodates the domain of the immeasurable extreme path and the life force, and then the truncated finger is cast, so the stronger the physical body, the stronger the truncated finger will be, and the more power it will contain.

Therefore, with Ye Tian's condensation of flesh and blood this time, the flesh body became more powerful, and it was easier to accommodate the power of the Infinite Extreme Dao Domain, causing the power of the severed finger to increase to a very terrifying level in the near future.

"My current strength should be enough to match the Void Whale Overlord!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Anyway, a high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Hurricane Ancestor was no match for him for a long time, he was enough to crush the Hurricane Ancestor, but he could only defeat the Hurricane Ancestor, and he couldn't kill it.

"It's time to go to the Void Whale Overlord to trade Hailou Gold, his Hailou Tianjin is not enough, I use Hailou Tianjin to trade his Hailou Gold, he will definitely be willing!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This time, he didn't copy the creatures of the Voidless Galaxy, because if he copied, he wouldn't be able to exert his strength.

Besides, there are so many high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Voidless Galaxy, and it is easy for him to expose his identity by copying one.

So, he directly replicated his body with his own human.

As for the copy body of the Xuanming Great Ancestor, it still has to be mixed in the Xuanqi Territory, so it is naturally inconvenient to expose it.

......

There is no empty galaxy, and the void whale mountain.

Ye Tian came here, although there was no suppression of the Void Galaxy, the strength of his copy body here was not very good.

And the Void Whale Overlord has the blessing of the Voidless Galaxy, and the strength he exerts is even stronger.

However, the Void Whale Overlord is in a weak state, and his real combat power is estimated to be about the same as him.

Therefore, he is not afraid of the Void Whale Overlord.

"Who?"

The Void Whale Overlord's roar spread throughout the surrounding territory.

In an instant, the incomparably large Void Whale Overlord came out of the Void Whale Mountain, and his will directly locked on Ye Tian.

At this time, although Ye Tian used all kinds of immeasurable ancestral endowments to hide his appearance and aura, etc., he still couldn't hide it completely, and there was still a trace of aura emanating from it.

And this trace of aura revealed his identity as a creature who was not a creature in the Xuanqi Realm.

"Outsider, you dare to appear in front of me!"

The Void Whale Overlord snorted coldly.

Suddenly, he shot directly.

And at this time, Ye Tian also urged his infinite body and amputated his fingers, and killed the Void Whale Overlord with one finger.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian collided with the attack of the Void Whale Overlord, shattering the surrounding river basin.

A large number of spaceless galactic creatures were affected and directly annihilated.

"Infinite Polar Domain Technology !!"

The face of the Void Whale Overlord changed drastically.

In his opinion, Ye Tian was only in the first stage of a high-level immeasurable life form, and he hadn't even condensed the immeasurable bones, but his strength was no less than him.

Normally, this is simply not possible.

However, Ye Tian possessed the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, and his physical body was incredibly powerful, which almost broke the physical limit of the first-stage high-level immeasurable life form.

"The number of times this outsider has reforged his life at the mid-level immeasurable lifeform stage must be more than ten times, plus his superior immeasurable body has reached the consummation realm, that's why the physical body is so terrifying!"

The Void Whale Overlord guessed.

The attainment of perfection by the superior immeasurable body is not a matter of talent, but of resources, and without enough precious resources, it is impossible to reach this step at all.

And even he can't provide so many resources, it can be seen that Ye Tian has a background, at least a lot of resources.

"Void Whale Overlord, I'm here to trade with you, not to fight with you!"

Ye Tian said.

"What deal?"

The Void Whale Overlord asked.

Since you can't kill Ye Tian, then ask Ye Tian's purpose.

"How about I use Hailou Tianjin to trade your Hailou Jin?"

Ye Tian said.

“......"

The Void Whale Overlord wanted to say, you are stupid, which high-level immeasurable life will trade Hailou Tianjin with Hailou Tianjin!

At his level, Hailou Tianjin is the real treasure, and Hailou Gold is an ordinary material, which is of no use to him.

"Are you sure you're trading Hailou Tianjin for Hailou Gold?" asked the Void Whale Overlord.

"Sure!"

Ye Tian didn't say the reason, and the Void Whale Overlord naturally didn't ask.

After all, such a good thing, he naturally has to agree.

Does that matter?

Even if Ye Tian had any plans behind him, it had nothing to do with him.

"How to trade, you say!" said the Void Whale Overlord.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, his Hailou Tianjin was made by fusing thirty-six pieces of Hailou Gold, but it was impossible to trade only thirty-six Hailou Gold, it would be a loss.

"A piece of Hailou Tianjin, trade 10,000 pieces of Hailou Gold!"

Ye Tian said.

Although this exchange ratio was high, he believed that the Void Whale Overlord was willing to trade.

Because no matter how much Hailou Gold is useless to him, but Hailou Tianjin is useful!

If he collects enough Hailou Tianjin, when he recovers from his injuries and the hidden dangers caused by burning bloodlines are removed, he can start to condense immeasurable blood.

Sure enough, after hearing this, the Void Whale Overlord did not hesitate at all, and directly agreed: "Okay, I agree!"

But then, the Void Whale Overlord said again: "Can you trade a part of the Hailou Gold first, and then trade it?"

The reason why he made such a request was because he didn't have too much Hailou Gold in his hands, and he was going to trade some Hailou Gold with other overlords, and then trade with Ye Tian.

In this way, he could trade more Hailou Tianjin from Ye Tian's hands.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Not long after, the Void Whale Overlord took out a total of 530,000 pieces of Hailou Gold and traded 53 pieces of Hailou Gold from Ye Tian's hands.

"Void Whale Overlord, this is my communicator, you can use this to contact me, but you don't have to do anything else, otherwise Void Whale Mountain will cease to exist!" Ye Tian admonished.

The Void Whale Overlord nodded slightly, he naturally would not be unfavorable to Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian himself was extremely demonic, and the forces behind him must be terrifying.

If he dared to have the mind to deal with Ye Tian, he might indeed die.

Therefore, he only trades and does nothing else.

Wow!

Ye Tian left here, and the Void Whale Overlord was about to go to other overlords to buy Hailou Jin.

"Let's go to the Dragon Scale Overlord first, he has a lot of Hailou Gold in his hand, and he should sell some Hailou Gold to me!"

After a while, the Void Whale Overlord crossed the Voidless Galactic Territory and came to the Dragon Scale Overlord.
